From LYN LAKE PSYCHOTHERA 16147074368 6/4/2026 12:11:05 PDT Page 02 of 20

909 Fulton Street SE
Minneapolis, MN 55455

RE: Logan (Savannah) Hoff
DOB: 04/19/2001

To Whom It May Concern,

Savannah is a 25 year old female who is seeking gender confirmation surgery. She is an adult, the age of majority and fully consenting to an orchiectomy. She is a transgender woman who has established a strong identity as female since 2020. Savannah reports that she has been receiving hormone therapy since 2019, attending consistent care with the prescribing provider.
She is now seeking an orchiectomy to aid in her medical transition.

Savannah meets diagnostic criteria for F64.1 gender dysphoria due to experiencing characteristics such as "a marked incongrucnce between one's experieneed/expressed gender and primary and/or secondary sex characteristics", "a strong desire to be rid of one's primary and/or secondary sex characteristics because of a marked incongruence with one's

experienced/expressed gender," "a strong desire to be of the other gender (or some alternative

99 ce,

gender different [rom one's assigned gender)," "a strong desire to be treated as the other gender
(or some alternative gender different from one's assigned gender)," and "a strong conviction that one has the typical feelings and reactions of the other gender (or some alternative gender from one's assigned gender)." Additionally, Savannah's gender dysphoria is associated with clinically significant distress or impairment in social, occupational, or other important areas of functioning.
She began therapy with me when she was 17, maintaining consistent weekly therapy appointments since 2023.

Savannah's mental co-morbidities are sufficiently well-controlled. She has made significant progress in her transition, seems very happy in her decision and is currently pursuing lcgal avenues for changing her name. Savannah has stable housing and a strong support system with both her long-term partner and stepfather. Her judgment appears sound and good, demonstrating how she is a strong self-advocate by seeking hormone therapy as soon as she had available resources to do so. She has knowledge of and the ability to follow WPATH Standa d of Care for surgery. She understands what is involved in the surgeries she. ' what recovery and healing will look like. Savannah has the ability to recovery from surgery. She understands that this will be a months |

looking forward to feeling happier and more secure with her body.

From LYN LAKE PSYCHOTHERA 16147074368 6/4/2026 12:11:05 PDT Page 03 of 20

es Lynbake

CENT

We have discussed how the surgery will help alleviate the distress that Savannah currently cxpcricnces in aligning her body characteristics with how she sccs herself. I have no hesitation in recommending her for an orchiectomy. In my professional opinion, this surgery is medically necessary to address gender dysphoria which has exacerbated the client's mental health symptoms. She meets and exceeds the criteria as set forth by the World Professional Association for Transgender Healthcare.

If you need any more information or have questions, please do not hesitate to contact me at
612-520-1232 or allison@therapy-mn.com.

Sincerely,

Allison Bjork
